ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks or grades of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the guardian to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the teacher (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "selection_criteria" TEXT /* Selection criteria for the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the program can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programs" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Whether the student is selected for the program */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the student applied for the program */,
  "selection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the student's selection or rejection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the student in the subject */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was recorded */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the grade was recorded */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "subject", "semester", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the record (e.g., academic, behavioral, health) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who created the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_students" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class or section the teacher is responsible for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id", "student_id")
)
column_names: Marks or grades of the student
Date of birth of the student
Date the student enrolled in the school
Phone number of the student's guardian
Relationship of the guardian to the student
Role of the teacher (e.g., teacher, administrator)
